name: Battle school
description:
I got this idea because fire emblem: three houses is good. It's techniquely mock battle after mock battle. Create your house or join one and lead them to the top of the standings. Win monthly all out mock war against the entire school to gain prizes like sacred or legendary weapons(fire emblem reference), or lose and become a more disdainful house. recruit new students into your house or poach other students from other houses. you choose. and Anything is allowed, so long as you know how to not get caught.

̄\_(ツ)_/ ̄

And if you make a house and want to share name in comments and house members if you want to, I can add it into the bot as well. if you want.

Bot is incomplete currently. I ran out of time but will work on it some more later.
creator: Kingnoob14
